text:
EXPLANATION: This is a well-known historical work by the Marquis de Condorcet, first published in 1785. The reference is accurate and represents a foundational text in social choice theory.

LINK: https://www.scienceopen.com/book?vid=e7728636-7e87-4127-bab1-6c0af146b588
FOUND_TITLE: Essai sur l’application de l’analyse à la probabilité des décisions rendues à la pluralité des voix
FOUND_AUTHORS: Marie Jean Antoine Nicolas de Caritat (Marquis de Condorcet)
FOUND_YEAR: 1785
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
